classes.description: When the navigation items overflow the width of the component, enable horizontal scrolling. By default, navigation items will wrap. This should not be applied to vertical navigations.
Tightens up the overall spacing and reduces the text size
Child of .s-navigation. The individual item in a navigation
Adds a small caret that indicates a dropdown
Applies to a navigation item that’s currently selected / active
Child of .s-navigation--item.The element meant to contain the text of the navigation item
Child of .s-navigation--item. Applies styling to the icon of the navigation item
Child of .s-navigation--item. Applies styling to the avatar of the navigation item

navigation-attributes.title: Preventing layout shift
navigation-attributes.description: Horizontal layout shift may occur when changing which item is selected within the navigation component. We recommend including the data-text attribute on the child navigation item text element with the value duplicating the text of the item to prevent the layout shift. See below for examples.

attributes.description: Prevents layout shift when changing selected button. Value should be the text of the navigation item.
